name: atlaso
description: Automatic long-term memory for Codex — recalls relevant context every turn, captures what matters, and syncs across sessions and devices.

interface.longDescription: Atlaso gives Codex a persistent memory: it recalls relevant context before each prompt, captures durable facts and decisions as you work, and syncs across your sessions and devices. Memory works locally even offline; sign in to sync to the cloud.
defaultPrompt: What do you remember about this project?
Remember this: we use pnpm, never npm.
What did we decide earlier about this?
